---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: 'STROBE-GEMA : a STROBE extension for reporting of geographically explicit
  ecological momentary assessment studies'
acronym: STROBE-GEMA
description: Reporting of geographically explicit momentary assessment (GEMA) studies.
doi: ''
pmid-id: '[38867286](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38867286/)'
pmid-url: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38867286/
relevant-urls: ''
full-bibliographic-reference: 'Kingsbury C, Buzzi M, Chaix B, Kanning M, Khezri S,
  Kiani B, Kirchner TR, Maurel A, Thierry B, Kestens Y. STROBE-GEMA: a STROBE extension
  for reporting of geographically explicit ecological momentary assessment studies.
  Arch Public Health. 2024;82(1):84.'


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: ''
additional-information: ''
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
# - Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
# - Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
# - Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
- Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
- Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
- Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
- Psychology
- Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
# - No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
# - Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
- Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- ambulatory assessment
- behavior
- behaviour
- checklist
- checklists
- Ecological Momentary Assessment
- environment
- environmental exposure
- experience sampling method
- GEMA
- GEMA checklist
- GEMA studies
- GEMA study
- geographic information system
- geographical
- geographically
- geographically explicit momentary assessment
- geolocation
- GIS
- global positioning system
- GPS
- location
- momentary
- momentary assessment
- momentary measurement
- public health
- sensor
- sensors
- STROBE
- STROBE-GEMA
- STROBE-GEMA checklist

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
